title: Twenty-five questions
subtitle: Go with what feels usual for you — not the version you wish you were.

items.text: I like thinking about ideas that are a little unusual.
I enjoy learning things outside my everyday routine.
I prefer sticking to what I know over trying something new.
I often imagine different ways a situation could go.
I notice small details in music, art, or writing.
I usually finish what I start.
My space or schedule is often messy.
I keep going on boring tasks until they are done.
I like having a simple plan before I jump into my day.
I put off important things until I really have to do them.
I feel more upbeat after spending time with people.
I would rather skip a big social event if I can.
I speak up when I have an opinion.
I like days that feel busy and full.
Starting a conversation with someone new feels fairly easy.
I try to understand someone before I judge them.
In a disagreement, I look for a middle ground.
Most people mean well until they show me otherwise.
I care about how my words might land on others.
I am quick to doubt people's motives.
I worry about what could go wrong more than I want to.
I stay calm when things get stressful.
Small annoyances can ruin my mood for a while.
Critical feedback stays in my head for a long time.
I bounce back quickly after a rough day.
